plugins.name: postical
plugins.description: Content engine for creating, optimizing, and distributing blog content at scale. SEO-driven pipeline from brand profiling through writing to social media posting.

plugins.name: hormozi
plugins.description: An interactive Alex Hormozi coach for founders. Diagnoses your binding constraint (market, offer, leads, or money model) and walks you through fixing it — Socratic, blunt, math-obsessed. Distilled from $100M Offers, $100M Leads, and $100M Money Models into 16 task-specific skills.
